name: s2-poc
description: Ratio 3.0 — S2 Multi-tenancy & Routing proof of concept

scripts.db:init: npm run migrate && npm run seed
scripts.pretest: node scripts/ensure-test-db.js && DATABASE_URL=postgres://localhost:5432/s2poc_test npm run migrate && DATABASE_URL=postgres://localhost:5432/s2poc_test npm run seed
